{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shyrax's golden force-blade
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax used a blurring golden [[force-blade]] to kill her opponent.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
